title: Panama
album: Ain't No Love In The City
why_this_song: Panama by Van Halen (1984) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Panama, Panama"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Don't you know she's coming home with me?"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Hot shoe, burnin' down the avenue"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Hot shoe, burnin' down the avenue"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Hot shoe, burnin' down the avenue"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

lines: Ain't nothin' like it, her shiny machine
Got the feel for the wheel, keep the moving parts clean

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "panama" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "panama" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "she's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "she's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Here she comes, full blast and top down
Don't you know she's coming home with me?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Panama" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Panama" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Panama" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Panama" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Panama" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Panama"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
